# rest_token (Resource)

Creates a Kubernetes ServiceAccount with a short-lived token for API authentication.

## Schema

### Required

- `kubeconfig` (String, Sensitive) The kubeconfig YAML content with client certificate auth.

### Optional

- `cluster_admin` (Boolean) Bind cluster-admin role. Defaults to true. Value defaults to `true`.
- `namespace` (String) Namespace for the ServiceAccount. Defaults to 'kube-system'. Value defaults to `kube-system`.

	~> Once set, the value of this attribute in state will not change.
- `service_account_name` (String) Name of the ServiceAccount. Defaults to 'terraform-rest'. Value defaults to `terraform-rest`.

	~> Once set, the value of this attribute in state will not change.
- `token_duration_seconds` (Int64) Token duration in seconds. Defaults to 86400 (24h). Value defaults to `86400`.

### Read-Only

- `endpoint` (String) The K8s API server endpoint from kubeconfig.

	~> Once set, the value of this attribute in state will not change.
- `id` (String) Composite ID: endpoint/namespace/service_account_name.

	~> Once set, the value of this attribute in state will not change.
- `token` (String, Sensitive) The generated Bearer token.
- `token_expiry` (String) RFC3339 timestamp when the current token expires.
